description: The OpenDataFeedCategory component receives Button Events and will open the Category with the path defined by the list ``CategorySubpath``.

fields.View: The view to change the directory for.
fields.CategorySubpath: A list of path directories (Like a folder path split by the slashes) to define the category to go to starting from root for ``View``.

usage: Add to a slot with a button and provide a path list for this component and it will start working.
